canonical_reason_codes: string; optional controlled reason labels, sorted alphabetically

reason_codes: standardized disposition reason code strings sorted alphabetically

active_condition_keys: string; normalized_key values from active condition records, sorted alphabetically
active_medication_keys: string; normalized_key values from active medication records, sorted alphabetically
active_allergy_keys: string; normalized_key values from active allergy records, sorted alphabetically

condition_keys: array of normalized active condition keys sorted alphabetically
medication_keys: array of normalized active medication keys sorted alphabetically
allergy_keys: array of normalized active allergy keys sorted alphabetically

condition_keys_added_from_active_endpoin: array of active condition keys present in patient endpoints but missing from duplicate preview
medication_keys_added_from_active_endpoi: array of active medication keys present in patient endpoints but missing from duplicate preview
allergy_keys_added_from_active_endpoints: array of active allergy keys present in patient endpoints but missing from duplicate preview

match_signals: string; duplicate candidate match signal labels, sorted alphabetically
conflict_signals: string; duplicate candidate conflict signal labels, sorted alphabetically
demographic_matches: string; demographic fields or normalized business signals that match, sorted alphabetically
demographic_conflicts: string; demographic fields or normalized business signals that conflict, sorted alphabetically

document_ids: string; relevant final document IDs for the merge packet, sorted alphabetically
audit_ids: string; relevant audit log IDs for the merge packet, sorted alphabetically

condition_keys: array of normalized inactive or non-merge condition keys sorted alphabetically
medication_keys: array of normalized inactive or non-merge medication keys sorted alphabetically
document_ids: array of unrelated document_id values sorted alphabetically
audit_ids: array of unrelated audit_id values sorted alphabetically

excluded_document_types: array of document type labels excluded from packet evidence

required_review_notes: array of normalized note codes sorted alphabetically
